CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2003 Continued To Oct-31-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Appearances:
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff, Northern California Collection Service, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, New On San Poultry Co., Inc.
Damages of $124,396.66.
Attorney's fees of $5,787.00.
Costs of $266.50.
Interest of $18,912.55 For the total of $149,362.71.
Judgment signed in open court.
